text.title: Dynamic Application Security Testing (DAST) in CI/CD Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals on the input to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Use when the right path is ambiguous.

decision-tree.root-question: Does a staging environment exist that mirrors production?

conclusion.verdict: Stand up staging first; DAST against prod is forbidden.

branch.question: What is the primary use case?

conclusion.verdict: Burp Suite outside CI; pair with this methodology for the automated baseline only

text.example: staging_exists=true → use_case=general_passive_baseline → ZAP baseline + nightly + post-deploy. References rule scheduled-cadence.
